name: Rogz Dog Utility Step In Harness Small - Blue
shortDescription: Rogz Dog Utility Step In Harness Small – Blue
description: Rogz Utility Step-In Reflective Dog Harness has a reflective yarn woven into the webbing for night time visibility so that everyone is aware that you & your dog are on an outing. Key Features: Reflective Stitching: Reflective yarn is woven into the webbing for nighttime visibility RogLoc: The Fort Knox of release buckles Low Load Technology: LLT technology reduces the load on the Titanium Plastic buckle through a cleverly positioned load ring Contoured Plastic Component: ROGZ rounded contoured plastic components ensure that every ROGZ collar fits snugly Die-Cast Ring: Custom designed die cast ring (no welding). Electroplated chrome for a tarnish free finish Size: Medium 16mm. (Girth measurement of 42-61cm)
